title: vivo X300 Ultra European price official, we unbox the Find X9 Ultra, week 16 in review
summary: Huawei's Pura X Max foldable will debut in China on April 20. The wide-aspect foldable is shorter but brings wider screens, especially the unfolded one. It packs a triple rear camera, and will come in a range of colors - Interstellar Blue, Olive Gold, Phantom Night Black, Vibrant Orange, and Zero D…

title: مرموش: لن نذهب لكأس العالم لمجرد المشاركة فقط.. وجاهزون لمنافسة أكبر المنتخبات
